title: phyllanthus virgineus
intro: Phyllanthus virgineus, also known as the Virgin's leaf or Green Chanca Piedra, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, antiviral, and diuretic effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus virgineus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney issues, and prevent the reoccurrence of urinary tract infections. Phyllanthus virgineus is often prepared as a tea or decoction by steeping its leaves in hot water, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
